name: status
description: Check account balance and positions on Polymarket. Use this to view current USDC balance and all open positions with P&L. For detailed position list with more info, use positions parameter.

positions.description: Show detailed position list with more information

name: copytrade
description: Mirror positions from whale wallets on Polymarket. This is the main copytrading command - by default runs in dry-run mode (no trades executed). Use this to follow successful traders with size-weighted aggregation. For paper trading without real money, use paper_trade instead.

wallets.description: Comma-separated list of wallet addresses to copy (e.g., '0x1234...,0x5678...')

top_n.description: Number of top positions to copy (default: auto-calculated based on balance)

name: copytrade_whale_exits
description: Sell positions when whales have exited them. Compares your current positions to whale positions and sells any that whales have closed. Use this to manage risk by exiting positions when the whales you're following have left.

wallets.description: Comma-separated list of wallet addresses to check (e.g., '0x1234...,0x5678...')

name: copytrade_rebalance
description: Full rebalance mode to match whale allocations. Unlike the default copytrade which only buys, this includes both buys AND sells to exactly match the whale's position allocations. Use this to fully mirror whale portfolio.

wallets.description: Comma-separated list of wallet addresses to copy (e.g., '0x1234...,0x5678...')

top_n.description: Number of top positions to include in rebalance

name: paper_trade
description: Paper trade with $SIM simulated money on Simmer's LMSR markets. Use this to test copytrading strategies without risking real USDC. Trades execute at real Polymarket prices with simulated $10K balance per market. For real trading with USDC, use copytrade with --live flag.

wallets.description: Comma-separated list of wallet addresses to copy (e.g., '0x1234...,0x5678...')

top_n.description: Number of top positions to copy

live.description: Execute trades (default: true for paper trading)
